zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley於1267年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾奧德利時，他的父親James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland47歲，母親Ela de Longespée44歲。他於大約1288年與Isolde de Mortimer結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1326年在英國波克夏瓦林福德享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特托布利其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley于1267年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾奧德利时，他的父亲James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland47岁，母亲Ela de Longespée44岁。他于大约1288年与Isolde de Mortimer结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1326年在英国波克夏瓦林福德享年60岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特托布利其。

nameMeanings.name: Audley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Audley in Staffordshire, named from the Old English female personal name Aldgȳth + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley was born in 1267, in Audley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland, was 47 and his mother, Ela de Longespée, was 44. He married Isolde de Mortimer about 1288. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. He died about 1326, in Wallingford, Berkshire, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in Tonbridge, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley est né en 1267, à Audley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Ela de Longespée, avait 44 ans. Il a épousé Isolde de Mortimer environ 1288. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé environ 1326, à Wallingford, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Tonbridge, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley 1267 in Audley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland 47 und seine Mutter Ela de Longespée 44. Er hat um 1288 Isolde de Mortimer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb um 1326 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Wallingford, Berkshire, England und wurde in Tonbridge, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley è nato il nel 1267 nel Audley, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Ela de Longespée, aveva 44 anni. Lui sposato Isolde de Mortimer circa 1288. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì circa 1326, nel Wallingford, Berkshire, England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Tonbridge, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audleyが1267年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアアウドリーで生まれた時，父James de Audley Justiciar of Irelandは47歳，母Ela de Longespéeは44歳であった。約1288年にIsolde de Mortimerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は約1326年にイギリスバークシュアイアワリングフォードで60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントトンブリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley(이)가 1267년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 오들리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Ela de Longespée(은)는 44세였다. 그는 대략 1288년 Isolde de Mortimer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1326년 영국 버크실르 월링퍼드에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 토브리지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley nasceu em 1267, em Audley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Ela de Longespée, tinha 44 anos. Ele casou-se com Isolde de Mortimer aproximadamente 1288. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1326, em Wallingford, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Tonbridge, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley родился в 1267 г. в местности аудли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Ela de Longespée, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Isolde de Mortimer около 1288 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер около 1326 г. в местности валлингфорд, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности тонбридж, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley nació en 1267, en Audley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Ela de Longespée, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Isolde de Mortimer aproximadamente 1288. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1326, en Wallingford, Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Tonbridge, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
